title: Malaysian Pork Skewers
description: A flavorful and tender pork skewer dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine, grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, and 1 tbsp of coconut oil. Add pork pieces and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread marinated pork onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush grill with coconut oil to prevent sticking.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
In a small bowl, whisk together golden malaysian chili sauce and 1 tbsp of ghee. Brush the glaze onto the grilled pork skewers.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
